summary: Iteration 13 - Complete testing of post-payment links and participant fields: All features working correctly. Admin panel Program form has WhatsApp, Zoom, and Custom link fields with toggle switches. Links persist correctly when editing programs. Enrollment page and Cart page both show 'First time joining Divine Iris Healing' checkbox and 'How did you hear about us?' dropdown with all 8 referral sources. Backend enrollment API accepts and stores is_first_time and referral_source fields. Payment status endpoint returns program_links, participants, booker_name, booker_email. All 11 backend tests passed.

issues: 404 errors for some image resources (non-blocking, likely missing program images)

critical_code_review_comments: Program model (models.py) correctly includes whatsapp_group_link, zoom_link, custom_link, custom_link_label, show_whatsapp_link, show_zoom_link, show_custom_link fields
AdminPanel.jsx Program form includes 'Program Links' section with all 3 link inputs and toggle switches
editProgram() function correctly loads link fields when editing a program
resetProgramForm() correctly resets link fields to default values
ParticipantData model (enrollment.py) correctly includes is_first_time (bool) and referral_source (str) fields
EnrollmentPage.jsx correctly renders 'First time joining Divine Iris Healing' checkbox with data-testid='p-first-time-{index}'
EnrollmentPage.jsx correctly renders 'How did you hear about us?' dropdown with data-testid='p-referral-{index}'
CartPage.jsx correctly renders same participant fields with data-testid='cp-first-time-{id}-{idx}' and 'cp-referral-{id}-{idx}'
CartCheckoutPage.jsx allParticipants mapping includes is_first_time and referral_source
PaymentSuccessPage.jsx correctly displays program_links section when links exist
check_payment_status (payments.py) correctly fetches program links from programs collection
enrollment_confirmation_email (emails.py) correctly accepts program_links param and renders link buttons in email
seed_data_creation: Test program with links created and deleted during test. Enrollment test data created during API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All post-payment links and participant field features verified. Admin panel Program Links section works correctly - links persist after save and edit. Enrollment and Cart pages show 'First time joining' checkbox and 'How did you hear about us?' dropdown. Backend correctly stores and returns these fields. Payment status endpoint returns program_links. Phone OTP is MOCKED (mock_otp returned in API).

mocked_features.phone_otp: MOCKED - OTP generated server-side, returned in API response field 'mock_otp' for testing
mocked_features.stripe_payments: Cannot fully test Stripe payment flow - requires real payment

admin_program_links.zoom_field: PASS - Zoom Meeting Link input with toggle switch
admin_program_links.custom_field: PASS - Other Link input with Label field and toggle switch
admin_program_links.save_links: PASS - Links saved correctly to database
admin_program_links.edit_links_persist: PASS - Links load correctly when editing program

enrollment_page_participant_fields.first_time_checkbox: PASS - 'First time joining Divine Iris Healing' checkbox with data-testid='p-first-time-{index}'
enrollment_page_participant_fields.referral_dropdown: PASS - 'How did you hear about us?' dropdown with data-testid='p-referral-{index}'
enrollment_page_participant_fields.referral_options: PASS - Options: Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Google Search, Friend / Family, WhatsApp, Returning Client, Other

backend_enrollment_api.POST_enrollment_start: PASS - Accepts is_first_time (bool) and referral_source (str) in participant data
backend_enrollment_api.enrollment_stores_fields: PASS - is_first_time and referral_source stored in enrollment document

backend_payment_status_api.program_links_structure: PASS - Returns whatsapp_group_link, zoom_link, custom_link, custom_link_label when program has them
